security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* data: blob:; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*

bundle.shortDescription: Self-host Open Magi as a desktop app.
bundle.longDescription: Open Magi desktop launches a local magi serve runtime and loads its dashboard in a hardened webview, so self-host users double-click an app instead of running a terminal command.
